content.text: I'll start by exploring the codebase to understand the existing code structure before implementing the tests.

content.content:
constants.go

1→package devmachine
     2→
     3→import (
     4→	"context"
     5→	"errors"
     6→	"testing"
     7→
     8→	. "github.com/onsi/ginkgo/v2"
     9→	. "github.com/onsi/gomega"
    10→	"go.uber.org/mock/gomock"
    11→	corev1 "k8s.io/api/core/v1"
    12→	storagev1 "k8s.io/api/storage/v1"
    13→	metav1 "k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1"
    14→
    15→	"code.srdcloud.cn/TDP-PaaS/tap/tap-edu-backend/internal/config"
    16→	"code.srdcloud.cn/TDP-PaaS/tap/tap-edu-backend/pkg/external/k8s"
    17→	k8smock "code.srdcloud.cn/TDP-PaaS/tap/tap-edu-backend/pkg/external/k8s/mocks"
    18→)
    19→
    20→func TestDevMachine(t *testing.T) {
    21→	RegisterFailHandler(Fail)
    22→	RunSpecs(t, "DevMachine Service Suite")
    23→}
    24→
    25→var _ = Describe("DevMachine Service", func() {
    26→	var (
    27→		ctrl    *gomock.Controller
    28→		k8sMock *k8smock.MockClient
    29→		service Service
    30→	)
    31→
    32→	BeforeEach(func() {
    33→		ctrl = gomock.NewController(GinkgoT())
    34→		k8sMock = k8smock.NewMockClient(ctrl)
    35→
    36→		// Mock GetStorageClass调用（NewService初始化时需要）
    37→		reclaimPolicy := corev1.PersistentVolumeReclaimDelete
    38→		bindingMode := storagev1.VolumeBindingImmediate
    39→		k8sMock.EXPECT().GetStorageClass(gomock.Any(), "tdsc-sc").Return(&storagev1.StorageClass{
    40→			ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{
    41→				Name: "tdsc-sc",
    42→			},
    43→			Provisioner:       "csi.juicefs.com",
    44→			ReclaimPolicy:     &reclaimPolicy,
    45→			VolumeBindingMode: &bindingMode,
    46→			Parameters: map[string]string{
    47→				"csi.storage.k8s.io/node-publish-secret-name":      "juicefs-secret",
    48→				"csi.storage.k8s.io/node-publish-secret-namespace": "kube-system",
    49→			},
    50→		}, nil).AnyTimes()
    51→
    52→		// Mock GetEndpoints调用（Ingress URL同步循环需要）
    53→		k8sMock.EXPECT().GetEndpoints(gomock.Any(), "kube-system", "ingress-nginx-controller").
    54→			Return(nil, errors.New("endpoint not found")).AnyTimes()
    55→
    56→		cfg := &config.Config{
    57→			InitContainer: config.InitContainerConfig{
    58→				Image: "mock-image:latest",
    59→			},
    60→		}
    61→		service = NewService(k8sMock, cfg)
    62→	})
    63→
    64→	AfterEach(func() {
    65→		ctrl.Finish()
    66→	})
    67→
    68→	Describe("CreatePod", func() {
    69→		Context("when create succeeds", func() {
    70→			It("should create pod successfully", func() {
    71→				pod := &k8s.PodSpec{
    72→					Name:  "test-pod",
    73→					Image: "nginx:latest",
    74→				}
    75→				k8sMock.EXPECT().CreatePod(gomock.Any(), gomock.Any()).Return(nil)
    76→
    77→				err := service.CreatePod(context.Background(), pod)
    78→				Expect(err).NotTo(HaveOccurred())
    79→			})
    80→		})
    81→
    82→		Context("when pod name is empty", func() {
    83→			It("should return error", func() {
    84→				pod := &k8s.PodSpec{
    85→					Name:  "",
    86→					Image: "nginx:latest",
    87→				}
    88→
    89→				err := service.CreatePod(context.Background(), pod)
    90→				Expect(err).To(HaveOccurred())
    91→				Expect(err.Error()).To(ContainSubstring("pod name cannot be empty"))
    92→			})
    93→		})
    94→
    95→		Context("when pod image is empty", func() {
    96→			It("should return error", func() {
    97→				pod := &k8s.PodSpec{
    98→					Name:  "test-pod",
    99→					Image: "",
   100→				}
   101→
   102→				err := service.CreatePod(context.Background(), pod)
   103→				Expect(err).To(HaveOccurred())
   104→				Expect(err.Error()).To(ContainSubstring("pod image cannot be empty"))
   105→			})
   106→		})
   107→
   108→		Context("when k8s returns error", func() {
   109→			It("should return error", func() {
   110→				pod := &k8s.PodSpec{
   111→					Name:  "test-pod",
   112→					Image: "nginx:latest",
   113→				}
   114→				k8sMock.EXPECT().CreatePod(gomock.Any(), gomock.Any()).Return(errors.New("k8s error"))
   115→
   116→				err := service.CreatePod(context.Background(), pod)
   117→				Expect(err).To(HaveOccurred())
   118→				Expect(err.Error()).To(ContainSubstring("k8s error"))
   119→			})
   120→		})
   121→	})
   122→
   123→	Describe("DeletePod", func() {
   124→		It("should delete pod successfully", func() {
   125→			k8sMock.EXPECT().DeletePod(gomock.Any(), "test-pod").Return(nil)
   126→
   127→			err := service.DeletePod(context.Background(), "test-pod")
   128→			Expect(err).NotTo(HaveOccurred())
   129→		})
   130→	})
   131→
   132→	Describe("GetPod", func() {
   133→		It("should get pod successfully", func() {
   134→			k8sMock.EXPECT().GetPod(gomock.Any(), "test-pod").Return(&k8s.PodInfo{
   135→				Name:   "test-pod",
   136→				Status: "Running",
   137→			}, nil)
   138→
   139→			pod, err := service.GetPod(context.Background(), "test-pod")
   140→			Expect(err).NotTo(HaveOccurred())
   141→			Expect(pod.Name).To(Equal("test-pod"))
   142→			Expect(pod.Status).To(Equal("Running"))
   143→		})
   144→	})
   145→
   146→	Describe("ListPods", func() {
   147→		It("should list pods successfully", func() {
   148→			labels := map[string]string{"app": "test"}
   149→			k8sMock.EXPECT().ListPods(gomock.Any(), labels).Return([]k8s.PodInfo{
   150→				{Name: "test-pod", Status: "Running"},
   151→			}, nil)
   152→
   153→			pods, err := service.ListPods(context.Background(), labels)
   154→			Expect(err).NotTo(HaveOccurred())
   155→			Expect(pods).To(HaveLen(1))
   156→			Expect(pods[0].Name).To(Equal("test-pod"))
   157→		})
   158→	})
   159→
   160→	Describe("GetPodLogs", func() {
   161→		It("should get pod logs successfully", func() {
   162→			k8sMock.EXPECT().GetPodLogs(gomock.Any(), "test-pod", int64(100)).Return("test logs", nil)
   163→
   164→			logs, err := service.GetPodLogs(context.Background(), "test-pod", int64(100))
   165→			Expect(err).NotTo(HaveOccurred())
   166→			Expect(logs).To(Equal("test logs"))
   167→		})
   168→	})
   169→})
   170→

1→package devmachine
     2→
     3→import (
     4→	. "github.com/onsi/ginkgo/v2"
     5→	. "github.com/onsi/gomega"
     6→
     7→	devmachinemodel "code.srdcloud.cn/TDP-PaaS/tap/tap-edu-backend/internal/model/devmachine"
     8→)
     9→
    10→var _ = Describe("Resource Builder", func() {
    11→	Describe("buildVolumes", func() {
    12→		Context("when WebIDE is VSCode", func() {
    13→			It("should create 1 volumes: dev-volume", func() {
    14→				volumes := buildVolumes(devmachinemodel.WebIDEVSCode)
    15→
    16→				Expect(volumes).To(HaveLen(1))
    17→
    18→				// 验证 dev-volume emptyDir
    19→				Expect(volumes[0].Name).To(Equal(devVolumeName))
    20→				Expect(volumes[0].EmptyDir).NotTo(BeNil())
    21→			})
    22→		})
    23→
    24→		Context("when WebIDE is Jupyter", func() {
    25→			It("should create 2 volumes including bootstrap-jupyter", func() {
    26→				volumes := buildVolumes(devmachinemodel.WebIDEJupyter)
    27→
    28→				Expect(volumes).To(HaveLen(2))
    29→
    30→				// 验证基础卷
    31→				Expect(volumes[0].Name).To(Equal(devVolumeName))
    32→
    33→				// 验证 Jupyter 专属卷
    34→				Expect(volumes[1].Name).To(Equal(bootstrapJupyterVolumeName))
    35→				Expect(volumes[1].EmptyDir).NotTo(BeNil())
    36→			})
    37→		})
    38→	})
    39→
    40→	Describe("buildInitEnv", func() {
    41→		Context("when WebIDE is VSCode", func() {
    42→			It("should set DEV_MODE to vscode", func() {
    43→				envVars := buildInitEnv(devmachinemodel.WebIDEVSCode)
    44→
    45→				Expect(envVars).To(HaveLen(1))
    46→				Expect(envVars[0].Name).To(Equal("DEV_MODE"))
    47→				Expect(envVars[0].Value).To(Equal("vscode"))
    48→			})
    49→		})
    50→
    51→		Context("when WebIDE is Jupyter", func() {
    52→			It("should set DEV_MODE to jupyter", func() {
    53→				envVars := buildInitEnv(devmachinemodel.WebIDEJupyter)
    54→
    55→				Expect(envVars).To(HaveLen(1))
    56→				Expect(envVars[0].Name).To(Equal("DEV_MODE"))
    57→				Expect(envVars[0].Value).To(Equal("jupyter"))
    58→			})
    59→		})
    60→	})
    61→
    62→	Describe("buildInitCommand", func() {
    63→		It("should use script mode", func() {
    64→			cmd := buildInitCommand()
    65→
    66→			Expect(cmd).To(HaveLen(3))
    67→			Expect(cmd[0]).To(Equal("sh"))
    68→			Expect(cmd[1]).To(Equal("-c"))
    69→			Expect(cmd[2]).To(ContainSubstring("/dev-bootstrap/entrypoint.sh"))
    70→		})
    71→	})
    72→
    73→	Describe("buildInitVolumeMounts", func() {
    74→		Context("when WebIDE is VSCode", func() {
    75→			It("should mount dev-volume", func() {
    76→				mounts := buildInitVolumeMounts(devmachinemodel.WebIDEVSCode)
    77→
    78→				Expect(mounts).To(HaveLen(1))
    79→				Expect(mounts[0].Name).To(Equal(devVolumeName))
    80→				Expect(mounts[0].MountPath).To(Equal("/opt/dev"))
    81→			})
    82→		})
    83→
    84→		Context("when WebIDE is Jupyter", func() {
    85→			It("should mount dev-volume and bootstrap-jupyter", func() {
    86→				mounts := buildInitVolumeMounts(devmachinemodel.WebIDEJupyter)
    87→
    88→				Expect(mounts).To(HaveLen(2))
    89→				Expect(mounts[0].Name).To(Equal(devVolumeName))
    90→				Expect(mounts[1].Name).To(Equal(bootstrapJupyterVolumeName))
    91→				Expect(mounts[1].MountPath).To(Equal("/mnt/"))
    92→			})
    93→		})
    94→	})
    95→
    96→	Describe("buildJupyterEnv", func() {
    97→		It("should include all required environment variables", func() {
    98→			envVars := buildJupyterEnv()
    99→
   100→			Expect(envVars).To(HaveLen(4))
   101→
   102→			// 验证 DEV_MODE
   103→			Expect(envVars[0].Name).To(Equal("DEV_MODE"))
   104→			Expect(envVars[0].Value).To(Equal("jupyter"))
   105→
   106→			// 验证 WORKDIR
   107→			Expect(envVars[1].Name).To(Equal("WORKDIR"))
   108→			Expect(envVars[1].Value).To(Equal("tap-edu"))
   109→
   110→			// 验证 POD_NAMESPACE
   111→			Expect(envVars[2].Name).To(Equal("POD_NAMESPACE"))
   112→			Expect(envVars[2].ValueFrom).NotTo(BeNil())
   113→			Expect(envVars[2].ValueFrom.FieldRef.FieldPath).To(Equal("metadata.namespace"))
   114→
   115→			// 验证 DEPLOYMENT_NAME
   116→			Expect(envVars[3].Name).To(Equal("DEPLOYMENT_NAME"))
   117→			Expect(envVars[3].ValueFrom).NotTo(BeNil())
   118→			Expect(envVars[3].ValueFrom.FieldRef.FieldPath).To(Equal("metadata.labels['app']"))
   119→		})
   120→	})
   121→
   122→	Describe("buildVSCodeEnv", func() {
   123→		It("should include all required environment variables", func() {
   124→			envVars := buildVSCodeEnv()
   125→
   126→			Expect(envVars).To(HaveLen(4))
   127→
   128→			// 验证 DEV_MODE
   129→			Expect(envVars[0].Name).To(Equal("DEV_MODE"))
   130→			Expect(envVars[0].Value).To(Equal("vscode"))
   131→
   132→			// 验证其他环境变量与 Jupyter 一致
   133→			Expect(envVars[1].Name).To(Equal("WORKDIR"))
   134→			Expect(envVars[2].Name).To(Equal("POD_NAMESPACE"))
   135→			Expect(envVars[3].Name).To(Equal("DEPLOYMENT_NAME"))
   136→		})
   137→	})
   138→
   139→	Describe("buildJupyterVolumeMounts", func() {
   140→		It("should mount all required volumes", func() {
   141→			mounts := buildJupyterVolumeMounts()
   142→
   143→			Expect(mounts).To(HaveLen(2))
   144→
   145→			// 验证 dev-volume
   146→			Expect(mounts[0].Name).To(Equal(devVolumeName))
   147→			Expect(mounts[0].MountPath).To(Equal("/opt/dev"))
   148→
   149→			// 验证 bootstrap-jupyter
   150→			Expect(mounts[1].Name).To(Equal(bootstrapJupyterVolumeName))
   151→			Expect(mounts[1].MountPath).To(Equal("/dev-bootstrap/tools/jupyter"))
   152→			Expect(mounts[1].SubPath).To(Equal("jupyter"))
   153→
   154→		})
   155→	})
   156→
   157→	Describe("buildVSCodeVolumeMounts", func() {
   158→		It("should mount all required volumes", func() {
   159→			mounts := buildVSCodeVolumeMounts()
   160→
   161→			Expect(mounts).To(HaveLen(1))
   162→
   163→			// 验证 dev-volume
   164→			Expect(mounts[0].Name).To(Equal(devVolumeName))
   165→			Expect(mounts[0].MountPath).To(Equal("/opt/dev"))
   166→		})
   167→	})
   168→
   169→	Describe("buildInitContainerCommand", func() {
   170→		It("should use script startup mode with DEV_MODE", func() {
   171→			cmd := buildInitContainerCommand()
   172→
   173→			Expect(cmd).To(HaveLen(3))
   174→			Expect(cmd[0]).To(Equal("bash"))
   175→			Expect(cmd[1]).To(Equal("-c"))
   176→			Expect(cmd[2]).To(ContainSubstring("DEV_MODE"))
   177→			Expect(cmd[2]).To(ContainSubstring("/opt/dev/scripts/start-"))
   178→			Expect(cmd[2]).To(ContainSubstring("${DEV_MODE}"))
   179→		})
   180→	})
   181→
   182→	Describe("buildUserContainerCommand", func() {
   183→		It("should use script startup mode with DEV_MODE", func() {
   184→			cmd := buildUserContainerCommand()
   185→			Expect(cmd).To(HaveLen(3))
   186→			Expect(cmd[0]).To(Equal("bash"))
   187→			Expect(cmd[1]).To(Equal("-c"))
   188→			Expect(cmd[2]).To(ContainSubstring("DEV_MODE"))
   189→		})
   190→	})
   191→
   192→	Describe("buildPodSpec", func() {
   193→		var request *devmachinemodel.CreateDevmachineRequest
   194→
   195→		BeforeEach(func() {
   196→			request = &devmachinemodel.CreateDevmachineRequest{
   197→				Namespace: "test-ns",
   198→				Name:      "test-dev",
   199→				ImageName: "registry.example.com/test:latest",
   200→				CPU:       "2",
   201→				Memory:    "4",
   202→			}
   203→		})
   204→
   205→		Context("when WebIDE is VSCode", func() {
   206→			It("should configure VSCode-specific volumes and containers", func() {
   207→				request.WebIDE = devmachinemodel.WebIDEVSCode
   208→				podSpec := buildPodSpec(request, "mock-image:latest")
   209→
   210→				// 验证调度器
   211→				Expect(podSpec.SchedulerName).To(Equal(volcanoSchedulerName))
   212→
   213→				// 验证卷数量（1个基础卷）
   214→				Expect(podSpec.Volumes).To(HaveLen(1))
   215→
   216→				// 验证 InitContainer
   217→				Expect(podSpec.InitContainers).To(HaveLen(1))
   218→				Expect(podSpec.InitContainers[0].Name).To(Equal(initContainerName))
   219→
   220→				// 验证容器
   221→				Expect(podSpec.Containers).To(HaveLen(1))
   222→				Expect(podSpec.Containers[0].Name).To(Equal("vscode"))
   223→			})
   224→		})
   225→
   226→		Context("when WebIDE is Jupyter", func() {
   227→			It("should configure Jupyter-specific volumes and containers", func() {
   228→				request.WebIDE = devmachinemodel.WebIDEJupyter
   229→				podSpec := buildPodSpec(request, "mock-image:latest")
   230→
   231→				// 验证卷数量（2个卷，包含 bootstrap-jupyter）
   232→				Expect(podSpec.Volumes).To(HaveLen(2))
   233→
   234→				// 验证容器
   235→				Expect(podSpec.Containers).To(HaveLen(1))
   236→				Expect(podSpec.Containers[0].Name).To(Equal("jupyter"))
   237→			})
   238→		})
   239→
   240→		Context("when WebIDE is not specified", func() {
   241→			It("should default to Jupyter", func() {
   242→				request.WebIDE = ""
   243→				podSpec := buildPodSpec(request, "mock-image:latest")
   244→
   245→				// 应该使用 Jupyter 配置（2个卷）
   246→				Expect(podSpec.Volumes).To(HaveLen(2))
   247→				Expect(podSpec.Containers[0].Name).To(Equal("jupyter"))
   248→			})
   249→		})
   250→	})
   251→})
   252→

1→package config
     2→
     3→import (
     4→	"os"
     5→	"testing"
     6→
     7→	. "github.com/onsi/ginkgo/v2"
     8→	. "github.com/onsi/gomega"
     9→)
    10→
    11→var _ = Describe("Config", func() {
    12→	var (
    13→		tmpFile    *os.File
    14→		configPath string
    15→	)
    16→
    17→	BeforeEach(func() {
    18→		var err error
    19→		tmpFile, err = os.CreateTemp("", "config_test_*.yaml")
    20→		Expect(err).NotTo(HaveOccurred())
    21→		configPath = tmpFile.Name()
    22→	})
    23→
    24→	AfterEach(func() {
    25→		if tmpFile != nil {
    26→			os.Remove(tmpFile.Name())
    27→			tmpFile.Close()
    28→		}
    29→		os.Unsetenv("SERVER_MODE")
    30→		os.Unsetenv("AUTH_ENABLED")
    31→	})
    32→
    33→	Describe("AuthConfig", func() {
    34→		Context("when in debug mode", func() {
    35→			BeforeEach(func() {
    36→				os.Setenv("SERVER_MODE", "debug")
    37→			})
    38→
    39→			It("should disable auth by default", func() {
    40→				configContent := `server:
    41→  mode: debug
    42→auth:
    43→  jwtSecret: "test-secret"
    44→`
    45→				_, err := tmpFile.WriteString(configContent)
    46→				Expect(err).NotTo(HaveOccurred())
    47→				tmpFile.Close()
    48→
    49→				cfg, err := Load(configPath)
    50→				Expect(err).NotTo(HaveOccurred())
    51→
    52→				Expect(cfg.Auth.Enabled).To(BeFalse())
    53→				Expect(cfg.Auth.JWTSecret).To(Equal("test-secret"))
    54→			})
    55→
    56→			It("should enable auth when explicitly set to true", func() {
    57→				configContent := `server:
    58→  mode: debug
    59→auth:
    60→  enabled: true
    61→  jwtSecret: "test-secret"
    62→`
    63→				_, err := tmpFile.WriteString(configContent)
    64→				Expect(err).NotTo(HaveOccurred())
    65→				tmpFile.Close()
    66→
    67→				cfg, err := Load(configPath)
    68→				Expect(err).NotTo(HaveOccurred())
    69→
    70→				Expect(cfg.Auth.Enabled).To(BeTrue())
    71→				Expect(cfg.Auth.JWTSecret).To(Equal("test-secret"))
    72→			})
    73→		})
    74→
    75→		Context("when in release mode", func() {
    76→			It("should enable auth by default", func() {
    77→				configContent := `server:
    78→  mode: release
    79→auth:
    80→  jwtSecret: "test-secret"
    81→`
    82→				_, err := tmpFile.WriteString(configContent)
    83→				Expect(err).NotTo(HaveOccurred())
    84→				tmpFile.Close()
    85→
    86→				cfg, err := Load(configPath)
    87→				Expect(err).NotTo(HaveOccurred())
    88→
    89→				Expect(cfg.Auth.Enabled).To(BeTrue())
    90→				Expect(cfg.Auth.JWTSecret).To(Equal("test-secret"))
    91→			})
    92→		})
    93→
    94→		Context("auth type configuration", func() {
    95→			It("should default to jwt", func() {
    96→				configContent := `server:
    97→  mode: release
    98→auth:
    99→  enabled: true
   100→  jwtSecret: "test-secret"
   101→`
   102→				_, err := tmpFile.WriteString(configContent)
   103→				Expect(err).NotTo(HaveOccurred())
   104→				tmpFile.Close()
   105→
   106→				cfg, err := Load(configPath)
   107→				Expect(err).NotTo(HaveOccurred())
   108→
   109→				Expect(cfg.Auth.AuthType).To(Equal("jwt"))
   110→			})
   111→
   112→			It("should accept basic_auth type", func() {
   113→				configContent := `server:
   114→  mode: release
   115→auth:
   116→  enabled: true
   117→  authType: basic_auth
   118→  jwtSecret: "test-secret"
   119→`
   120→				_, err := tmpFile.WriteString(configContent)
   121→				Expect(err).NotTo(HaveOccurred())
   122→				tmpFile.Close()
   123→
   124→				cfg, err := Load(configPath)
   125→				Expect(err).NotTo(HaveOccurred())
   126→
   127→				Expect(cfg.Auth.AuthType).To(Equal("basic_auth"))
   128→			})
   129→
   130→			It("should reject invalid auth type", func() {
   131→				configContent := `server:
   132→  mode: release
   133→auth:
   134→  enabled: true
   135→  authType: invalid_type
   136→  jwtSecret: "test-secret"
   137→`
   138→				_, err := tmpFile.WriteString(configContent)
   139→				Expect(err).NotTo(HaveOccurred())
   140→				tmpFile.Close()
   141→
   142→				_, err = Load(configPath)
   143→				Expect(err).To(HaveOccurred())
   144→				Expect(err.Error()).To(ContainSubstring("invalid auth_type"))
   145→			})
   146→		})
   147→	})
   148→})
   149→
   150→func TestConfig(t *testing.T) {
   151→	RegisterFailHandler(Fail)
   152→	RunSpecs(t, "Config Suite")
   153→}
   154→

    20→// ==================== Deployment 构建 ====================
    21→
    22→// generateDevMachineDeployment 生成开发机 Deployment
    23→func generateDevMachineDeployment(request *devmachinemodel.CreateDevmachineRequest, initContainerImage string) *appsv1.Deployment {
    24→	labels := generateLabels(request.Namespace, request.Name, request.Labels)
    25→	annotations := generateAnnotations(request.QueueName, request.Annotations)
    26→
    27→	deployment := &appsv1.Deployment{
    28→		ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{
    29→			Name:        request.Name,
    30→			Namespace:   request.Namespace,
    31→			Labels:      labels,
    32→			Annotations: annotations,
    33→		},
    34→		Spec: appsv1.DeploymentSpec{
    35→			Replicas: ptr.To[int32](1),
    36→			Selector: &metav1.LabelSelector{
    37→				MatchLabels: labels,
    38→			},
    39→			Template: corev1.PodTemplateSpec{
    40→				ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{
    41→					Labels:      labels,
    42→					Annotations: annotations,
    43→				},
    44→				Spec: buildPodSpec(request, initContainerImage),
    45→			},
    46→		},
    47→	}
    48→
    49→	return deployment
    50→}
